title: Temu Lucky Blocks
description: This project adds Temu Lucky Blocks! It is fully vibe-coded!!!
body:
# 📦 TEMU Lucky Blocks

This mod was specifically created for a YouTube challenge, focusing on fun, content, and absolute madness rather than being a polished "pro" mod. Expect the unexpected!

### 🎮 How to play:
There are 11 special items which twist your game. You can place down the lucky blocks and open them to test your luck!
* Use `/give @p temu-luckyblocks:temu_lucky_block` to obtain the blocks in game.
* Use `/resetluckyblocks` to reset the loot pool.

### ✨ Features:
* **The TEMU Lucky Block:** A brand new block that contains either your greatest treasure or your funniest nightmare.
* **11 Unique Items:** Discover a variety of special items with custom 3D models and unique attributes, including:
    * **MLG Glasses & Alien Glasses:** Look cool while surviving.
    * **The Ballet Outfit:** A "high-fashion" 3D armor piece that definitely wasn't made for combat (but looks great).
    * **Magma Boots:** Extremely powerful protection, though they might look a bit... invisible.
    * **Propeller Hat, Cat Ears, and more!**
* **Stat Twists:** Some items will change your size (Scale 1.5x) or give you crazy attribute boosts.

### 🛠️ Why download?
If you are looking for a mod to spice up your survival world, troll your friends, or create funny moments for a video, this is for you. It's lightweight, chaotic, and 100% made for the laughs. Enjoy!

*Created for content by **[kovixvagyok](https://kovix.hu/)**.*
